name: garden-mvp
description: GARDEN MVP - Perfiles verificados, reservas, pagos QR, reseñas

scripts.setup:db: npm run ensure:env && cd garden-api && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma db seed
scripts.setup:db:dev: cd garden-api && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma db seed
